title: Trump and Putin Talk, and Ukraine Shrugs
summary_full: More than a year of similar conversations have failed to bring the country any closer to peace, so Ukrainians have stopped hoping they will.
summary_public: More than a year of similar conversations have failed to bring the country any closer to peace, so Ukrainians have stopped hoping they will.

UA.label: negative
UA.evidence: failed to bring the country any closer to peace
